description_long: This is a compact, futuristic handgun with a robust, angular frame predominantly finished in matte green with black and metallic gray accents. The slide features subtle wear and weathering, suggesting frequent use, and is adorned with engraved markings and numbers. The grip is ergonomically contoured, made of black polymer with a textured surface for secure handling, and includes a visible blue button or indicator on the side. The trigger guard is thick and rounded, seamlessly integrated into the lower frame, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is short and recessed, with a wide muzzle opening and no visible threading or compensator. The overall design is modern and tactical, suitable for urban law enforcement or military scenarios.
description: A compact, modern handgun with a green and black finish, ergonomic grip, and engraved slide markings. The design is robust and tactical, featuring a short barrel and integrated trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green slide with engraved markings, black ergonomic grip, and blue indicator button.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, recessed barrel opening and the thickness of the slide and trigger guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying similar slide engravings, grip texture, and overall symmetry of the handgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, grip contour, and the alignment of the sights.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is made of black polymer with a contoured ergonomic shape, featuring a pronounced palm swell and subtle finger grooves for enhanced comfort and control. The surface is textured with a stippled pattern to improve traction, and a blue button or indicator is embedded on the side. The grip appears robust and slightly flared at the base, with no visible logos or decorative embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, rounded, and smoothly integrated into the lower frame, providing ample space for finger placement. It lacks aggressive undercuts or squared-off edges, instead favoring a continuous, reinforced curve that enhances structural strength. No additional texturing or accessory rails are visible on the guard.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and recessed within the slide, with a wide, circular muzzle opening. It has a smooth, unthreaded exterior and no visible compensators or porting. The finish is consistent with the rest of the slide, showing some wear but no distinct markings.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved markings, including a series of numbers and possible model designations on both sides. These markings are subtle, located towards the rear and center of the slide, and are rendered in a simple, utilitarian font. No manufacturer logos or decorative patterns are prominently visible.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly extended, blending seamlessly with the grip's contour. It lacks finger rests, flaring, or aggressive beveling, and appears to be constructed from the same black polymer as the grip. No logos or texturing are visible on the magazine base.
